t1.promptTranslation: Selamat pagi. Boleh saya bantu? (Se-la-mat pah-gee. Boh-leh sa-ya ban-too?) — Good morning. Can I help you?

t-repeat.promptTranslation: Maaf, boleh ulang sekali lagi? (Mah-af, boh-leh oo-lang se-ka-li la-gee?) — Sorry, could you repeat that?

t-end.promptTranslation: Sama-sama. Selamat jalan! (Sah-ma sah-ma. Se-la-mat jah-lan!) — You're welcome. Have a good journey!

t2_post.prompt: Oh, pejabat pos. Jalan terus saja, nanti ada lampu isyarat. Belok kiri di lampu isyarat itu.
t2_post.promptTranslation: Oh, pejabat pos. Jalan terus saja, nanti ada lampu isyarat. Belok kiri di lampu isyarat itu. (Oh, pe-ja-bat pos. Jah-lan te-rus sa-ja, nan-tee ah-da lam-pu ee-sha-rat. Be-lok kee-ree dee lam-pu ee-sha-rat ee-too.) — Oh, the post office. Just go straight, later there will be a traffic light. Turn left at that traffic light.

t3_distance.prompt: Tidak jauh. Lebih kurang lima minit jalan kaki dari sini.
t3_distance.promptTranslation: Tidak jauh. Lebih kurang lima minit jalan kaki dari sini. (Tee-dak ja-ooh. Le-beh koo-rang lee-ma mee-nit jah-lan ka-kee da-ree see-nee.) — Not far. Approximately five minutes walk from here.

t3_nextstep.prompt: Selepas belok kiri, terus lagi dalam dua ratus meter. Pejabat pos ada di sebelah kanan.
t3_nextstep.promptTranslation: Selepas belok kiri, terus lagi dalam dua ratus meter. Pejabat pos ada di sebelah kanan. (Se-le-pas be-lok kee-ree, te-rus la-gee da-lam doo-a ra-tus me-ter. Pe-ja-bat pos ah-da dee se-be-lah ka-nan.) — After turning left, go straight for about two hundred meters. The post office is on your right.

t4_bus.prompt: Ya, boleh naik bas nombor 10. Perhentian bas ada di seberang jalan sana.
t4_bus.promptTranslation: Ya, boleh naik bas nombor sepuluh. Perhentian bas ada di seberang jalan sana. (Yah, boh-leh na-ik bas nom-bor se-poo-looh. Per-hen-tee-an bas ah-da dee se-be-rang jah-lan sa-na.) — Yes, you can take bus number 10. The bus stop is across the road over there.
